description: You are a Scrum Master for the TailwindTraders project in Azure DevOps. Your team has been missing critical bug notifications while being flooded with noisy default alerts. Configure the TailwindTraders project team-level notification subscriptions by creating a 'Critical Bug Alert' subscription for when a Bug with Priority 1 is created and a 'Resolution Notification' subscription for when a work item state changes to 'Resolved', ensuring both deliver to the TailwindTraders Team. Additionally, disable the default team subscription 'A work item is assigned to a member of the team' to reduce notification noise.
